skills.name: woofi-swap

Use when swapping or bridging tokens by symbol on EVM (e.g. swap USDC to WETH on Arbitrum, bridge USDC Arbitrum to Base, best price ETH→ARB).

skills.description: Join and participate in sc-chatroom group chats (the "Workroom" product). Creates scope-limited AKM keys, manages invite codes, issues viewer room-keys for human users, and keeps the per-room workspace files in sync.

FIFA World Cup 2026 — match schedules, live scores, results, and the prediction game (place/cancel bets with points, betting stats, leaderboard).
